ocr_findings.description: Emoji '🖋️' in OCR for the 'もう少し詳しく！' sidebar icon — image shows a pen icon as inline graphic, OCR emoji substitution is cosmetic.
'💠' used for マルチタスク section icon — image shows a coloured diamond/share icon; emoji substitution is cosmetic.

reviewer_notes: Page 12-01 covers OS application software definition, basic vs application software sidebar, and multitask section opening. All key definitions and the bold multitask definition sentence are faithfully captured. Multitask diagram image placeholder is acceptable. Chapter margin label '第12章ソフトウェア' captured at end of OCR output — correct.
